source_description: Close #1537 (duplicate fetchSchema race — page wrapper + child component both call useSchema(entityType).fetch() in onMounted, firing two POST requests because the cache check happens too late) and #1538 (digit-string env vars coerced to numbers by Nuxt runtime-config serializer — NUXT_PUBLIC_ENABLE_REALTIME=1 silently becomes the number 1, breaking === '1' checks). The architectural fix on each side: (1) useSchema() must dedup in-flight requests, not just cache results; (2) typed runtime-config envelope via a single useAdminConfig() composable that validates and coerces at the boundary, replacing ad-hoc String(x) === '1' and === '1' patterns scattered through the SPA.
